translations.login.not_active:
Thank you for your subscription!

In order to activate your account, we have sent you an email with an activation link.

Click the activation link in the email or enter the code you received in the field below.
translations.password_lost.identifier.desc: Enter your identifier and confirm. You will receive an email to reset your password.
translations.password_lost.email_sent: An email has been sent to you
translations.password_reset.title: Choose a new password
translations.password_reset.success: Your password has been successfully updated!
translations.password_reset.confirmation.desc:
An email has been sent to you.

Enter the code received in the email to reset your password.

The email also contains a direct link to reset your password.
translations.school.activate.need_code: You must enter an activation code.
translations.school.activate.success:
Congratulations! Your school has been successfully activated.
You can now log in.
translations.school_not_found.headline: Oops… It looks like this school does not exist!
translations.school_not_found.info: If you think this is a mistake, feel free to contact us at contact@omniscol.com
translations.error.password.format: Password must be between {min} and {max} characters
translations.error.password_reset.not_found: Invalid code, or no pending password reset request
translations.error.server:
Server error detected.

The Omniscol team has been informed and will deal with this problem ASAP.
translations.newschool.title: Creation of your school
translations.newschool.change_domain.help: This domain name is already taken. It may happen when someone creates a school with the same domain between your request and validation. Please choose another domain name, you will be then redirected to a new school creation webpage.
translations.try.domain.desc: Used for accessing your school (e.g. "myschool" will be accessible by myschool.omniscol.com)
translations.try.domain.format: Domain name must be composed of 4 to 30 lowercase letters, numbers, "-" or "_". It must absolutely begin by a letter or a number.
translations.error.javascript.catched: A JavaScript error has occurred on this page. This may cause inconsistent page behavior and affect your experience. The Omniscol team has been informed and will address the issue ASAP.
translations.account.warning.renewlicense: Contact the Omniscol team to renew your license!
translations.account.warning.readonly: Your license has expired! This account is in read-only mode.
translations.account.warning.disabled: Your license has expired! This account is deactivated.
translations.password_lost.error: Your request was not successful. Please try again or contact your administrator.
translations.access.oauth2.app_access_account: The application {client_name} requests access to your account
translations.access.oauth2.scopes: Your account will be used, within the limits of your access rights, for:
translations.error.login.restricted: Your account does not have the required permissions to access this application.
